name: Favorite Bean Recipe
recipeIngredient: 2 cans dark red kidney beans, drained
3/4 cup sliced celery OR 1/2 cup sliced tender stalks of Lovage
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all vegetables and piccalili in a large bowl.
2. Season with ground white pepper to taste.
3. Add mayonnaise to moisten.
4. Mix well until everything is evenly coated.
5. Chill the mixture for at least 30 minutes before serving.
